title: Redis Offset/Schema Storage Flow
interaction_flow: RedisCommonConfig → Configuration: subset(prefix, true), validateAndRecord(fields), init(config)
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisOffsetBackingStore: connect() → closeClient() if existing
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisConnection: getInstance(config) [reads address, dbIndex, user, password, timeouts, SSL, cluster flags]
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisConnection: getRedisClient('debezium:offsets', waitEnabled, waitTimeout, waitRetry, waitRetryDelay)
RedisConnection → JedisClusterClient: new(jedisCluster) → return (no WAIT wrapper)
RedisConnection → Jedis: new(HostAndPort, config) + ping() + clientSetname('debezium:offsets')
RedisConnection → WaitReplicasRedisClient: new(jedisClient, replicas=1, waitTimeout, waitRetry, waitRetryDelay)
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisClient: hgetAll('metadata:debezium:offsets') [Uni async with indefinite backoff retry]
Redis Server → RedisClient: Map<String, String> offsets
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisOffsetBackingStore: deserialize bytes → ByteBuffer map (data)
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisOffsetBackingStore: connect() reconnect, then retry
Connector → RedisOffsetBackingStore: save() [called by MemoryOffsetBackingStore on flush]
RedisOffsetBackingStore → RedisClient: hset(keyName.getBytes(), field_bytes, value_bytes) [Uni async, backoff 1s→2s, indefinitely]
WaitReplicasRedisClient → WaitReplicasRedisClient: sleep(delay), retry hset+wait loop
RedisClient → Redis Server: HSET key field value
Connector → RedisSchemaHistory: configure(config, comparator, listener, useCatalog)
RedisClient → Redis Server: XADD key * schema <json>
key_relationships: RedisConnection static factory: getInstance(RedisCommonConfig) → new RedisConnection(...)
RedisConnection creates JedisClient or JedisClusterClient; wraps with WaitReplicasRedisClient if waitEnabled
WaitReplicasRedisClient implements RedisClient (decorator pattern over JedisClient)
JedisClusterClient implements RedisClient (wraps JedisCluster, no WAIT support)
RedisOffsetBackingStore uses hset/hgetAll (Redis Hash) for offsets
RedisSchemaHistory uses xadd/xrange (Redis Stream) for schema records
important_notes: ConfigProperties (testing module) holds system-property-based config for OCP/Docker test infra — not directly in offset/schema write path; tangential to this flow.
RedisOffsetBackingStore.load() uses Mutiny Uni with indefinite retry + exponential backoff (initialDelay→maxDelay).
RedisOffsetBackingStore.save() uses fixed backoff 1s→2s indefinitely per entry.
RedisSchemaHistory.storeRecord() uses doWithRetry helper (maxRetryCount attempts, exponential backoff).
Cluster mode disables WaitReplicasRedisClient wrapper; WAIT is standalone-only.
SSL: custom truststore/keystore triggers SslOptions; hostnameVerification otherwise sets SSLParameters HTTPS endpoint ID.
Data format: offsets stored as Redis Hash (HSET/HGETALL), schema history as Redis Stream (XADD/XRANGE).
